roa.docketEntryComment: DEF OPP MOT TO DETAIN DEF WITHOUT BAIL UNDER PC1270,FILED

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR: 05-02-22/TE: 3 WEEKS/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE 03-17-22 AND TRIAL 04-15-22/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE COURT RECEIVES 4 SUBPOENAED ENVELPOES (BY THE PEOPLE) OF MEDICAL RECORDS FOR REVIEW/X:THE PEOPLE MOVE THE COURT TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF A CPO FILED IN  CASE #21003037/MO GRTD/ /WIT SWORN DA:SFPD SGT, SHAWN MENDEZ/WIT SWORN DA:SFPD OFC, MU'AMMAR ALI/CTORD:THE SUBPOENAED DOCUMENTS (IN ENVELOPES 1 & 3)ARE RELEASED TO THE PEOPLE WITH NO STIPULATION BY THE DEFENSE, ENVELOPES 2 & 4 ARE RETASINED BY THE COURT/WIT SWORN DA:SFPD OFC, TIMOTHY BROPHY/EXHM:PEO 1 - CD/EXHMA:PEO 1A - VIDEO CLIP ON PEOPLE'S 1/EXHMA:PEO 1B - VIDEO CLIP ON PEOPLE'S 1/EXHMA:PEO 2 - ENVELOPE WITH DISK INSIDE/EXHMA:PEO 2A - 3 PAGE DOCUMENT/ARG&SUB/HTA1:1, 2& 3/CTORD:THE SPECIAL ALLEGATIONS AS TO COUNTS 2 & 3 (BOTH PC12022,7(E))ARE BOTH FOUND TO BE TRUE/CTORD:THE MISDEMEANORS IN COUNTS 4 & 5 ARE CERTIFIED TO SUPERIOR COURT/X:THE COURT FINDS BY CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE THAT RELEASING THE DEFENDANT OR LESS RESTRICTIVE ALTERNATIVES TO INCARCERATION WOULD NOT/X:REASONABLY PROTECT THE PUBLIC OR THE VICTIM/X:THE COURT MAKES FURTHER FACTUAL FINDINGS ON THE RECORD,/NB/SHERCOM1/X:EXHIBITS MARKEDAND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED/X:TO THE OFFERING PARTYPENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT IN DEPT 22 ON 03-02-22/DOP/

/CAL: MOTION TO DETAIN/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON HOME DETENTION MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BERELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: FUTURE DATE IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:THE PEOPLE FILE A MOTION TO DETAIN/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TODEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:02-18-22 (10TH)/BAIL: 75,000/SA1:JADA ARMANI REESE/SA2:1427 KAVANAUGH DR, E, PALO ALTO, CA/SAORD2/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: MOTION TO DETAIN ON 02-09-22 IN M09/DOP/CONTD:TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 02-07-22 IN M20/TE:3 HOURS/DOP/
/CAL:JURY TRIAL, LD 05-02-22/DAWT/X:PEOPLE AND DEFENSE READY/CAUSE1/X:ORDER SIGNED AND FILED/4011,6/X:THE 05-03-22 PTC IN S23 CONFIRMED/CONT/DOP
/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 16/TRANS 16:FORTHWITH FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/
/CTORD:MATTER OFF CALENDAR FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON: SCHEDULED IN ERROR   /
